# AGSWS — Social Welfare Society

> A Kolkata-based NGO providing medical aid, education support, and GoldenAge elderly care for families across West Bengal. Donations are 80G tax-deductible.

AGSWS runs three core programs — Medical Aid (emergency care, surgeries, medicines), Education Support (school sponsorships for under-resourced children), and GoldenAge Care (community wellness check-ins and emergency liaison for elderly parents, including NRK families). The site supports online donations, parent registration, beneficiary applications, CSR partnerships, and volunteering.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Mission overview, featured causes, and live impact ticker.
- [About](/about): History, leadership, and operating model.
- [Initiatives](/initiatives): All AGSWS programs at a glance.
- [Medical Aid](/initiatives/medical): Hospital and emergency care program details.
- [Education Support](/initiatives/education): Child sponsorship program details.
- [Donate – Medical](/donate/medical): Give to medical aid (80G eligible).
- [Donate – Education](/donate/education): Sponsor a child's school year.
- [Register a Parent](/register-parent): GoldenAge Care enrollment for elderly parents.
- [Apply for Support](/apply): Beneficiary application for medical or education aid.
- [CSR Partnership](/csr): Corporate partnership and CSR proposals.
- [Volunteer Portal](/volunteer-portal): Join as a volunteer.
- [Donor Wall](/donor-wall): Recent donors and contribution stories.
- [Impact Report](/impact): Annual impact, financials, and fund journey.
- [Transparency](/transparency): Governance, audits, and disclosures.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming and past events.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Event photo albums.
- [Blog](/blog): Stories from the field.
- [Updates](/updates): Newsletter and WhatsApp field updates.
- [Resources](/resources): Downloadable guides and forms.
- [FAQ](/faq): Donations, registration, and tax questions.
- [Contact](/contact): Office address, phone, and email.

## Optional

- [Track Donation](/track-donation): Look up the journey of a past donation.
- [Track Registration](/track): Check parent registration status.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Use](/terms)
- [Refund Policy](/refund)
